scripts/example/hello.cls.description: A simple hello world Apex class

scripts/external-repos/SF-Developer-Perm.description: Metadata bundle for read-only developer access in QA/UAT environments — profile, permission set, permission set group, and muting permission set

scripts/external-repos/Salesforce-Deploy.description: Web-based deployment tracking tool with 8 phases and 48 checklist items — available as a Node.js app and Salesforce LWC

scripts/ai-prompts/copado-cli-project-co.description: System prompt for Claude to act as a Copado CLI executor — handles auth, story syncing, merge conflict resolution, and self-healing validation loops

scripts/ai-prompts/technical-article-htm.description: System prompt for formatting technical articles into a specific HTML structure with section headers, banners, code blocks, and grammar fixes

scripts/copado/promotion-user-story-prog.description: Lists user stories in a promotion ordered by commit date — use to track progress through merge conflicts

scripts/copado/find-user-stories-by-comp.description: Find all Copado user stories that include a given component by its metadata API name

scripts/user-management/reset-user-permi.description: Strips all permission set assignments from specified users, reassigns them to a reduced-access profile, then grants a single permission set group
